# daytona_update_sandbox_last_activity (Action)

Updates a Daytona sandbox last-activity timestamp.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "daytona_update_sandbox_last_activity" "example" {
  config {
    sandbox_id = "sandbox-id"
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sandbox_id` (String) Daytona sandbox ID.

### Optional

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID` for this action. Defaults to the provider-level organization ID when configured.
